topic: Diabetes Type 2 is reversible — what the science shows
caption: Did you know that Type 2 Diabetes can be reversed? 🌟 Studies have shown that through dietary changes and weight loss, you can reduce your blood sugar levels and even put the disease into remission. 💡 Here are the facts: 1) A study of 306 patients found that 40% were able to reverse their diabetes through intensive lifestyle changes. 2) Losing just 5-10% of your body weight can improve insulin sensitivity and reduce blood sugar levels. 3) Eating a plant-based diet rich in fiber and antioxidants can help regulate blood sugar. 🥗 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💖 #diabetesreversal #type2diabetes #healthyliving #weightloss #plantbased
